title: RoutingDecision
description: A record of the CCAP routing engine's provider selection decision for a payment transaction. Included in the audit log entry for every ccap/pay, invoice settlement, and ccap/escrow release. Queryable via GET /v1/routing-decisions/{decision_id}.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this routing decision.

transaction_id.description: The CCAP transaction ID this decision was made for.

agent_id.description: The CCAP agent ID of the payer.

provider_selected.description: The provider that was selected to execute the transaction.

providers_considered.description: All providers that were evaluated before the selection was made. Includes providers that were excluded and the reason.

selection_reason.description: The specific factors that led to the selected provider being chosen.

amount_usd.description: The transaction amount in USD equivalent.

cost_rank.description: Rank of the selected provider by transaction cost (1 = cheapest).

speed_rank.description: Rank of the selected provider by expected settlement speed (1 = fastest).

recipient_accepts_provider.description: Whether the recipient agent has the selected provider configured.

fallback.description: True if the primary provider was unavailable and this was a fallback selection.

primary_provider_failure_reason.description: If fallback is true, the reason the primary provider was not selected.

estimated_fee_usd.description: Estimated transaction fee in USD for the selected provider at decision time.

estimated_settlement_seconds.description: Estimated time to settlement in seconds for the selected provider.

decided_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the routing decision was made.

ProviderCandidate.description: A provider that was evaluated during routing, including why it was selected or excluded.

considered.description: Whether this provider was a valid candidate (passed all mandatory filters).

outcome.description: The outcome for this provider in the routing decision.

exclusion_reason.description: If outcome is 'excluded_*', a human-readable explanation.
examples: Recipient agent has not configured this provider
Provider does not support USDC transactions

score.description: Composite routing score assigned to this provider (higher is better). Only present for candidates that were not excluded.

providers_considered.exclusion_reason: x402 is not suitable for transactions above USD 10.00; this transaction is USD 42.50
